stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
An aircraft follows the green dashed route and crosses only an occluded front, shown on the chart with alternating purple symbols (^•^•^•). Based on the weather depicted, what conditions is the pilot likely to encounter after crossing the occlusion, en route to the destination?

options.b: Light, intermittent rain with scattered cumulus clouds.
options.c: Nimbostratus and stratus clouds with continuous precipitation.
